item.description:
## DockPops Companion 1.0
- Dynamic poplet icons now stay in sync more reliably, both for running poplets and for the on-disk app icons Finder and the Dock pick up later. - The companion now reacts to shared-container changes automatically, so pop updates do not depend on a dead polling path or a lucky manual refresh. - Poplet bundle updates are safer: writes are staged, replacements are cleaner, and bundle-signing work is better guarded against race conditions.

## DockPops Companion 1.0.1
- Added a launch spinner so the app no longer flashes "DockPops not found" before startup finishes. - Fixed the oversized window regression so the main window opens at a sane utility size again. - Preserved the simpler grid-first layout for dragging Pops into the Dock.
